name: Cottage Cheese-Spinach Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Low Fat Cottage Cheese, rinsed and drained
1/2 package (10 oz.) Frozen Chopped Spinach, partially thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine cottage cheese, egg substitute, and flour in a bowl.
3. Add the cubed cheese and spinach chunks along with salt.
4. Place the mixture in a baking dish and bake uncovered for 60 minutes.
